3226180.name: Zozo's Show
3226180.description:
This is a horror game about a program from the deepest layers of the internet, where children go through deadly games, with a distorted idea of ​​a children's program.

The game will be part of a series of original games that together will complete the game's story.

In this first game, the player controls a child who is taking part in the games, participating in puzzles and avoiding being killed by enemies.
3226180.supported_languages:
英语*, 葡萄牙语 - 巴西*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
